goal: Build a DIY Enabot-like rolling home camera robot: dual-wheel drive, Wi-Fi camera, battery pack, keep using junk donor motor driver if possible

available_parts.name: dead RC toy car donor board
available_parts.notes: Dual H-bridge section and motor harnesses still intact — reuse, do not buy L298N

available_parts.name: ESP32-CAM AI-Thinker with OV2640
available_parts.notes: Camera + Wi-Fi brain for telepresence (catalog esp32-cam-module)

evidence_notes: splice:keep motor harness intact on J_MOTOR_L and J_MOTOR_R
splice:measure VMOTOR before connecting ESP32-CAM logic
splice:do not gap-fill L298N — donor H-bridge is the driver
buy:only if camera/Wi-Fi missing from bin
